plan_adherence_notes: All 11 plan steps executed faithfully. Steps 1-10 map 1:1 to the mock factory and 9 test cases. Step 11 (vitest run) confirmed all 9 tests pass. Minor gap: legend test (step 10) verifies text but not colored dot background styles — defensible since jsdom background-color assertion is unreliable.
missed_questions: Single-point series edge case: component renders circles but no <path> when points.length <= 1 (PriceChart.tsx:150). No test covers this behavior.

X-axis test tautology: the test recomputes the component's own tick logic rather than asserting hardcoded expected labels. A question about independent verification vs. logic mirroring would have prevented this.
reason: All 9 tests pass. Every plan step was executed. Research was thorough with concrete evidence and all decisions were faithfully implemented. Test file follows established VolumeChart.test.tsx patterns (plain render, container.querySelectorAll, screen.getByTestId). Two minor gaps — untested single-point series edge case and tautological X-axis test — are not blocking. Overall a well-structured, idiomatic test suite.
